title: Alberta infrastructure minister accepted free Edmonton Oilers playoff tickets
notes: Primary source for EVT-116. Infrastructure Minister Peter Guthrie told reporters May 30 2024 he attended Edmonton Oilers home playoff games as a guest of MHCare Medical, a medical supply and distribution company. Guthrie stated he has no 'business or personal relations' with MHCare's CEO. MHCare also held a $70M AHS contract to import children's pain medication from Turkey (see EVT-072 and EVT-089). No byline confirmed. URL needs HTTP check.
